description_long: This is a tracked combat tactical vehicle resembling a Soviet-era tank, featuring a long, prominent main cannon extending from a rounded turret. The hull is robust and angular, with visible hatches, vents, and storage compartments on the upper surfaces. The vehicle is equipped with six large road wheels on each side, supporting continuous metal tracks for all-terrain mobility. The exterior is painted in a light, weathered color with visible numbers and markings, and the surface appears to be constructed from thick, armored metal plates. Antennas and additional equipment are mounted on the turret and hull, suggesting communication and operational capability. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility in urban and battlefield environments.
description: A heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a long cannon, rounded turret, and light weathered paint, featuring visible numbers and robust metal tracks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the long cannon, rounded turret, and thick frontal armor with hatches and vents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the six large road wheels, continuous tracks, and the number '71' painted on the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the engine grilles, rear hatches, and the back of the tracks and hull.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, wheels, and number '71' on the hull.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body covered in thick, sloped steel armor plating, especially prominent on the front and turret.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid light gray/white paint with weathering; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Red number '71' painted on both sides of the hull; no other visible insignia.
